gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的语音留言编织出一段跨越生死的浪漫奇缘，笑中带泪的惊喜之作。
gems.whyWatchEn: A wrong-number voicemail sparks a cross-distance romance that bridges grief and laughter—unexpectedly heartfelt.
gems.audience: 喜欢非典型爱情片、对温暖治愈故事有偏好的观众
gems.audienceEn: Fans of unconventional romance and heartwarming, healing narratives.
